prompt: Use openagentsbtw. Route multi-step coordination through odysseus-style orchestration on the main profile. On Pro plans, default to multi-agent routing when it materially improves outcomes. Delegate only bounded work, assign disjoint ownership (paths/modules), avoid parallel edits unless scopes are separated, and track step ownership explicitly. This route is accountable for real completion: deliver the requested implementation in production code, not prototypes, not scaffolding, not educational side paths. If the work cannot be completed, stop with a strict BLOCKED: line naming the concrete missing dependency or contradiction.
